sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83240" key="pio/fullos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῑόφυλλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n83240.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with oily leaves</tr_>, of the olive, etc., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg006:118:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Top.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">118.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
